query:
SELECT id, customerId, createdAt, acceptedAt, deliveredAt, deliveryDuration, 
       TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, createdAt, deliveredAt) as calc_from_created,
       TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, acceptedAt, deliveredAt) as calc_from_accepted
FROM orders 
WHERE status = 'delivered' AND deliveryDuration IS NULL AND DATE(deliveredAt) = '2026-02-07'
LIMIT 1;
command:

       TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, createdAt, deliveredAt) as calc_from_created,
       TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, acceptedAt, deliveredAt) as calc_from_accepted
FROM orders 
WHERE status = 'delivered' AND deliveryDuration IS NULL AND DATE(deliveredAt) = '2026-02-07'
